title.content: GitHub Daily Radar · A 精编版（1/1）

elements.content:
**今日概览**
本卡共 10 条，覆盖 0 个项目、10 个技能、0 个提案 / 讨论。
已按编辑优先级排序，并做了同仓库去重，避免单一仓库刷屏。
候选 60 条，LLM 精编 0 条，A 10 / B 10，API 搜索 9 次 / GraphQL 0 点。
这一卡优先展示今天最值得点开的内容。

**必看技能**
- [jwasham/coding-interview-university](https://github.com/jwasham/coding-interview-university)
  - 摘要：A complete computer science study plan to become a software engineer.
- [freeCodeCamp/freeCodeCamp](https://github.com/freeCodeCamp/freeCodeCamp)
  - 摘要：freeCodeCamp.org's open-source codebase and curriculum. Learn math, programming, and computer science for free.
- [openclaw/openclaw](https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw)
  - 摘要：Your own personal AI assistant. Any OS. Any Platform. The lobster way. 🦞
- [public-apis/public-apis](https://github.com/public-apis/public-apis)
  - 摘要：A collective list of free APIs
- [sindresorhus/awesome](https://github.com/sindresorhus/awesome)
  - 摘要：😎 Awesome lists about all kinds of interesting topics
- [donnemartin/system-design-primer](https://github.com/donnemartin/system-design-primer)
  - 摘要：Learn how to design large-scale systems. Prep for the system design interview.  Includes Anki flashcards.
- [kamranahmedse/developer-roadmap](https://github.com/kamranahmedse/developer-roadmap)
  - 摘要：Interactive roadmaps, guides and other educational content to help developers grow in their careers.
- [github/gitignore](https://github.com/github/gitignore)
  - 摘要：A collection of useful .gitignore templates
- [practical-tutorials/project-based-learning](https://github.com/practical-tutorials/project-based-learning)
  - 摘要：Curated list of project-based tutorials
- [vinta/awesome-python](https://github.com/vinta/awesome-python)
  - 摘要：An opinionated list of Python frameworks, libraries, tools, and resources
